title: CSS Basics
description: Selectors, layout, and responsive styling fundamentals.

questions.prompt: Which property changes an element's text color?
questions.explanation: The color property sets the foreground text color.

questions.prompt: The box-sizing: border-box rule includes padding and border in the declared width.
questions.explanation: border-box makes the declared size include content, padding, and border.

questions.prompt: Which are valid flex container alignment properties?
questions.explanation: justify-content, align-items, and align-content are flex alignment properties.

questions.prompt: Which unit is relative to the root element's font size?
questions.explanation: rem units are based on the root element's font size.

questions.prompt: Which techniques can create a responsive layout?
questions.explanation: Media queries, Grid, and flexible dimensions all support responsive layouts.
